title: UNION MINISTER SHRI GIRIRAJ SINGH VISITS SERICULTURE TRAINING INSTITUTE, ZEMABAWK
content:
50/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th of May, 2026:Union Minister of Textiles, Shri Giriraj Singh, visited the Sericulture Training Institute (STI) at Zemabawk today. He was accompanied by Shri Lalthansanga, Minister of Sericulture, Govt. of Mizoram.

The Union Minister of Textiles, along with accompanying officials, participated in a ceremonial plantation of Som tree saplings—the primary food plant for Muga silkworms—at the Sericulture Training Institute (STI) campus. Alongside Union Minister Shri Giriraj Singh, Mizoram's Sericulture Minister Shri Lalthansanga and Central Silk Board (CSB) Member Secretary Shri P. Siva Kumar also planted the saplings. Following the plantation drive, the Union Minister and accompanying officials visited the Silk Reeling Factory located within the STI campus to review and oversee the silk production process.

Subsequently, a function was organized at the Conference Hall of STI, wherein Shri Giriraj Singh, along with his delegation, held an interactive session with farmers and weavers.

Speaking on the occasion, Shri Giriraj Singh extended his greetings to farmers from 211 villages across Mizoram, stating that his visit was not merely to deliver a speech but to forge a deeper connection with them. The Minister remarked on how fortunate Mizoram is for being the only North Eastern state capable of producing all four varieties of silk: Muga, Eri, Mulberry, and Tasar. He noted that across 11 districts of Mizoram, approximately 6,000 farmers and 19,000 individuals rely on sericulture and silk based activities as their primary source of livelihood. The Union Minister also observed that Mizoram's climate and soil are exceptionally well-suited for sericulture and he expressed appreciation for the sector's recent steady growth of about 5.5% to 6% in the State.

The Union Minister of Textiles also expressed his vision to develop Muga silk farmers in Mizoram as "Muga Leaders" and he stated that a substantial amount of funds has already been sanctioned for Mizoram under Silk Samagra 2.0. Expressing his preference for a cluster-based approach in the State, Shri Giriraj Singh proposed that four districts—Lunglei, Champhai, Saitual and Siaha—be designated as "Muga districts", while the remaining districts should focus on rearing other varieties of silk. He emphasized that working through a cluster-based approach brings faster and visible progress, and if such initiatives are undertaken, the Central Silk Board would extend its support. To encourage further progress, the Minister urged the government authorities to organize healthy competitions among silk farmers by introducing performance parameters and creating awards to recognize top performers. Additionally, Shri Giriraj Singh stated that efforts would be made to explore collaboration with the National Institute of Fashion Technology(NIFT) for weavers and entrepreneurs engaged in silk-based textile production and value addition.

Minister for Sericulture, Shri Lathansanga, expressed his appreciation and gratitude for the progress achieved by Mizoram through various Central Government schemes. However, he noted that much remains to be done regarding infrastructure development within the sericulture sector and requested further assistance from the Central Government. The Minister further stated that under Silk Samagra 2.0, cocoon processing unit has been established in Mizoram, and that cocoons produced by Mizo farmers are being sold to other states. He also highlighted that the Sericulture Department is being given significant priority under the State’s flagship programme- Bana Kaih.

The Union Minister was accompanied by Shri Yogendra Singh, IAS, PS to HMoT; APS Shri Jai Krishna; Smt. Vrunda Manohar Desai, IRS, Textile Commissioner(Ministry of Textiles); Shri P. Siva Kumar, IFS, Member Secretary of CSB; Smt. Florence Zotluangpuii, MCS, Secretary to the Govt. of Mizoram, Sericulture Department; Shri Lalrinawma, Director, Sericulture Department, Govt. of Mizoram, and other officials and dignitaries.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER PU LALDUHOMA LEH DR. VK PAUL INKAWM
content:
367/2026-2027

Aizawl the 4th May 2026:New Delhi-a châm mek Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan vawiin khan Niti Ayog Member kal chhuak tur Dr VK Paul chu Mizoram House, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi-ah a kawm a, Mizoram hmasawnna tur kawng hrang hrang an sawi dun.

Dr. VK Paul chuan a hun chhunga Mizoram sorkar nen ṭha taka an thawh dun avangin lawmthu a sawi a, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma hmalakna hrang hrang fakin Niti Aayog nen thawhona ṭha tak an nei thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a hrilh a. Mizoram chu state ralmuang tak a nih thu state dangten an hriatpui thu a tarlang.

Chief Minister pawhin Niti Aayog-in Mizoram a duhsaknaah lawmthu sawiin sawhthing chungchanga hmalakna an neihte chu Mizoram in a chhawr mek thu a sawi a, "Ginger Capital of India-ah min puang khan rah ṭha a chhuah chho zel a ni," a ti. Mizoram chu ziak leh chhiar thiam vekna state hmasa ber a nih thu te, eirukna leh hlemhletna laka state fihlim ber a nih thu te, khualzin hip kawnga hmasawn nasa tak a nih thute leh India rama state ralmuang ber a nih mek thu hrilhin, "Tun hnaiah silai keng pawl awm chhunte pawh remna kan siampui leh tawh a ni," tiin Mizoram hmasawnna langsarte a hrilh a ni.

Inkawmnaah hian Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Tourism Minister pawh telin Niti Aayog leh Mizoram sorkarin Tourism Conclave an buatsaih dun tur chungchanga hmalaknate an thlir a. May thla chawhnu lamah Delhi-ah pre-conclave meeting neih an rel bakah Tourism Conclave-a Niti Aayog hmalaknate official lamin an hrilhfiah a ni.

Niti Aayog lam hian Mizoram tourism policy changtlung zawk duan dan tur te, Mizoram puala Institute of Hotel Management-Ashok (IHM-A) hnuaia a thlawna training neih theih dante leh investor koh luh chungchangte Chief Minister leh Tourism Minister hi an sawipui bawk.

He hunah hian Pu Alexander V Chongthu, Addl. Resident Commissioner, Mizoram House; Pi R Lalrodingi, Director, Tourism Department, Pu Lalrinawma Khiangte, PS to CM-ten Chief Minister hi an ṭawiawm a; Niti Ayog aṭangin Swapnalee Batacharya, Dy. Director General leh Dr. Pricilia C Ngaihte, Consultant-te an tel bawk.

title: LOK SABHA MP PU RICHARD VANLALHMANGAIHA'N THINGDAWLAH FUTSAL GROUND THAR A HAWNG
content:
365/2026-2027

Thingdawl, 4th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan Thingdawl V/C-II huamchhunga Futsal Ground thar chu a hawng. He hunah hian Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan a tawiawm a ni.

Khuallian MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan Futsal ground peihfel a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ruihtheihthilin thalaite a tihbuai nasatzia tarlangin, Mizoramah ruihhlo (drugs) hmang mek mi 14,000 chuang record an awm thu a sawi. Mizorama ruihhlo hmang (drug users) chu 6.9% lai niin, India ram pum chawhrual aiin a sang daih a ni, a ti. Tun dinhmunah de-addiction centre hrang hrangah mi 5,000 chuang an awm mek thu a sawi bawk.

Kum 1990 atanga chhutin Mizoramah HIV hrik pai mi 30,000 chuang hmuhchhuah an ni tawh a, ruihhlo leh HIV vanga nun chan pawh mi thahnem tak an awm tawh a ni, a ti a. Ruihhlo dona kawngah hian mipui tanrual a ngaih thu leh, thalaite ruihhlo laka an boral zel loh nan tan lak a ngai a ni, a ti. Amaherawhchu,harsatna tam tak karah pawh kan thalaite an chhe vek bik lo a, ruihhloa buai lo, thalai fel tak tak an tam a, hengte pawh hi min fuih thartu atan kan hman a ngai a ni, a ti bawk.

MP chuan hmeichhiate pawh infiamna ah thangchho zel se la, he Futsal ground pawh hi hmang tangkai ngei se a duh thu a sawi a. Sawrkar hmasawnna hnathawh te thlawp zel turin mipuite a sawm a, development hnathawh hrang hrang kal mekte pawh uluk taka lo chik (monitor) tura chahin, heng kawngah hian khawtlang tanrual a pawimawh thu leh chu chu ram hmangaihna lantirna pawimawh tak a ni, a ti.

Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia pawhin thu sawiin, Thingdawl khawtlangin infiamna lamah hmasawnna an neih a beisei thu sawiin duhsakna a hlan a. Thalaiten ruihtheihthil ti lova infiamna lama an tlan nan he khelmual hi hmanrua  pawimawh tak a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Khualzahawm Pu H. Lalfakzuala, ZPM Tuirial West Block President leh Pi Doris Lalrinawmi, Thingdawl BDO ten thusawina hun an hmang bawk.

He Futsal Ground hi Member of Parliament Local Area Development (MPLAD) Fund 2024-25 atanga cheng nuai 15 senga sak a ni a. Futsal ground hawnna denchhen hian tournament buatsaih nghal a ni a, chhimtu mipui thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: PHED MINISTER LAUNCHES FAINA PUITU APP
content:
49/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th May, 2026 :PHED Minister Prof. Lalnilawma launches FAINA PUITU Application today at the E-in-C Office Meeting Hall, PHED Office.

FAINA PUITU App enables users to track their sanitation truck, check waste collection schedule, avail door-to-door pickup,sell recyclable garbage like cardboard, metal, plastic and e-waste, read rules and regulations on waste management, and file a complaint.

The application can be downloaded from IOS and Android free of charge during the period of 2026 and for a fee of ₹10 per month from 2027 onwards. The application has been utilised in the Aibawk RD Block effectively while it has not been used in the Aizawl Municipality area yet.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma expressed his pleasure regarding the launch of the FAINA PUITU application, and stated that Mizoram is keeping pace with global progress, and this application is an excellent way to save both time and energy.He further noted that waste can be utilized effectively, highlighting that researchers often refer to this concept as "Waste to Wealth". To ensure the proper implementation of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026, as issued by the Supreme Court, he mentioned that plans are underway to work alongside Village Councils (VCs) for waste processing outside of Aizawl. He expressed confidence that this application would be instrumental in those efforts.

Prof. Lalnilawma also pointed out that under the New Education Policy (NEP), a key "graduate attribute" (a standard expected of a graduate) is a concern for sanitation and cleanliness. He emphasized that Mizos need to introspect on whether we maintain cleanliness in areas that are not immediately visible.Describing the application as a "win-win solution", he concluded by stating that it is essential to find effective ways to educate and inform the public on how to use the app.

The launch programme was chaired by Er. Zodinthari, PHED Engineer-in-Chief. Pu Laldinthara, CEO of Waste Technology and Bio Energy and the Operator of the Aibawk Plastic Waste Management Centre, demonstrated the uses of the application.

Attachment

title: FAINA PUITU APP PHED MINISTER-IN A TLANGZARH
content:
363/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th May, 2026 :PHED Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan vawiin khan E-in-C Meeting Hall, PHED Office-ah Faina Puitu mobile application a tlangzarh.

He application hmang hian mahni sanitation point a bawlhlawh paih motor thlen chin hriat theihna te, bawlhlawh paih tur bik hriat theihna te, lungawi lohna thlenna te, mahni in atanga bawlhlawh paih theihna te (Door to Door Pickup) a awm a. Bawlhlawh re-cycle theih hralhna (Garbage Store) te, bawlhlawh paih kawnga dan leh dun (Rules and Regulations) chhiar theihna te leh mipui tana hriattur pawimawh en theihna te pawh he application ah hian a awm bawk.. FAINA PUITU hi Android leh Mac ah download theih niin, kumin chhung (2026) atan man chawi loa hman theih niin, nakum (2027) atangin thla tin cheng 10 chawi a ngai tawh dawn a ni. Tunah hian Aibawk RD Blockah hman a nih tawh a, Aizawl Municipality huam chhungah erawh hman a la ni lo.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan FAINA PUITU tlangzarh theih a ni hi lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, “Mizoram pawhin khawvel hmasawn rualin ke kan pen ve zel a,hun leh tha save na tha tak a ni” a ti. Bawlhlawh hi tangkai taka hman theih dan a awm a, zir bing mite chuan waste to wealth (Bawlhlawh atanga rohlu siam) tiin an sawi bawk a ti.  Supreme Court thuchhuah siam, Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 dik taka hman a nih theih nan, Aizawl pawnah chuan VC-te nen bawlhlawh sawngbawl lamah hma lak an tum thu a sawi a, chung atan chuan he application hi a tangkai a rin thu a sawi bawk. Prof. Lalnilawma chuan New Education Policy (NEP) hnuaiah graduate attribute (graduate nihphung tur) tehna pawimawh tak pakhat chu faina lam ngaihsak a ni a; Mizote hi a langlo lamah kan fai em tih zawhna inzawh a tul thu a sawi.He application hi win-win solution (Mi zawng zawng tana hlawkna) a nih thu sawiin, a hman dan mipuite inhrilhhriat dan kawng zawn a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Tlangzarh programme hi Er. Zodinthari, PHED Engineer-in-Chief in a kaihruai a, Er. Lalropuia Hmar, Project Management Unit (PMU) Director in thu sawiin, Pu Laldinthara, Waste Technology and Bio Energy CEO leh Aibawk Plastic Waste Management Centre Operator ni bawk chuan he application sawi hawnna hun a hmang.Pu Laldinthara chuan he application hman dan tlangpui a sawifiah a, bawlhlawh lakkhawmna kawngah app tangkai tak a nih theih ngei a beisei.

Attachment

title: ṬANPUIA SOLO PAINTING EXHIBITION VAWI 13-NA CHU I&PR DIRECTOR PI K. VANLALSANGI’N A HAWNG
content:
362/2026-2027

Aizawl, 3 May 2026:Artist Ṭanpuia chuan a Solo Painting Exhibition vawi 13-na chu vawiin khan Aizawl Art Gallery, MUP Building (2nd Basement), Upper Khatla-ah a buatsaih a, I&PR Director Pi K. Vanlalsangi’n a hawng a ni.

Pi K. Vanlalsangi chuan Pu Ṭanpuia’n art lama a hmalakna leh a hnathawh pawimawhzia a sawi a, art chu kan hnam nun leh khawtlang nun entirna pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi. Pi K. Vanlalsangi chuan Pu Ṭanpuia chu Mizoram pawna solo painting exhibition buatsaih thei awmchhun a ni tiin, chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a .I&PR leh Mizoram Art Development Society(MADS) te thawh dunna chu lawmawm a tih thu leh vawi 13 lai mimala exhibition a buatsaih thei chu  chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Ṭanpuia hian kum 1999 atangin solo exhibition vawi engemawzat nei tawhin, Aizawl bakah Bangalore leh Kolkata-ah te pawh a buatsaih tawh a. A hnathawhte hi group show leh workshop hrang hrangah te pholangin, a painting-te hi Mizoram chhung leh ram pawn thlengin collection-ah dah an ni bawk.

Exhibition hi May ni 4 atanga May ni 9, 2026 chhungin zing dar 10:00 atanga tlai dar 5:30 thlenga tlawh theih tura hawn a ni a. He programme hi I&PR Department leh MADS ten an tum (funded) a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION TEXTILES MINISTER PU GIRIRAJ SINGHA'N ZOHANDCO A TLAWH
content:
361/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th of May, 2026:Zan khat riaka Mizoram tlawha lo zin Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh chuan vawiin khan Mizoram Handloom and Handicrafts Development Corporation Limited (ZOHANDCO) Office a tlawh a. Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga’n Union Minister hi a tawiawm a ni.

Union Textiles Minister pual hian ZOHANDCO chuan mizo kutchhuak, puantah chi hrang hrang leh thiamhnangdeh chi hrang hrangte phochhuahna (exhibition) an buatsaih a, Minister chuan he exhibition-a thil phochhuahte a enkual hnu hian puantahtute leh sumdawngte nen inkawmna a nei leh bawk a ni.

Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh chuan, Silk vang leh tha bika an sawi - Muga silk chu Mizorama a tam thu sawiin, Mizoram chu ‘Golden State’ tih hiala koh a duh tih a sawi a. Kum 2035-ah chuan silk metric ton 1000 aia tam an dehchhuah theih ngei a beisei thu leh Central sawrkar chuan kuthnathawktute hmasawn zelna atan sum pek chhuah an ui loh thu a sawi. Hmeichhiate chawikan pawimawhzia sawiin, puantahtu nuhote chu Lakhpati Didi scheme hmang tangkai turin a chah a; he scheme hnuaiah hian tun dinhmunah cheng nuai 5 thleng pek theih niin, nuai 10 thleng dawn theih tura siam an tum thu a sawi bawk.

Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh chuan Sawrkar Laipui Textiles Ministry atanga, amah tawiawmtu officer pawimawh eng emaw zatte nena Mizoram an lo tlawh chhan sawiin, zin satliah mai mai an nih loh thu te, Mizorama Sericulture Department than zelna tur te, farmer-te hmasawnna tur leh Mizoram mipuite thatna tur ngaihtuaha lo kal an nih thu a sawi.

Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga pawhin Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh-a leh sawrkar laipui hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. A cham chhung ni hnih lek chhunga Mizoram tana hna tam tak a thawh hman avang leh a inpeknaahte lawmthu sawiin, Mizoram pawhin hma sawn turin theihtawp an lo chhuah tur thu a sawi.

Weavers’ Service Centre, Eastern Zone, Zonal Director Pu S Bandyopadhyay chuan an hmalak tawhna hrang hrangte tarlangin, Guwahati a pilot project an kalpui mek - ‘market led model’ chu Mizoramah kalpui ve an tum tih a sawi a. He market led model-ah hian Weavers’ Service Centre hnuaiah training buatsaih thin niin, training kal mekte tan hnathawh tur an zawnpui nghal thin a. Mipui lei duh zawng leh hralh tla tur thil zirchiannate kalpui thin niin, chumi mil chuan trainee-te chu zirtir an ni leh thin a, an kutchhuakte hralhna tur pawh zawnsak nghalin, training an neih mek lai pawhin an thil siam chhuahte hi hralhsak an ni thin a ni. WSC a training chhuak-te hian kum khatah cheng nuai 5 tal an hlawh chhuah theihna turin hma an lakpui thin a ni.

Vawiin programme tawi buatsaihah hian Pu Giriraj Singh chuan SAMARTH Training Certificate leh E-Pehchan Card a sem a. Hei bakah hian Yarn Pass book leh Artisan ID Card semchhuah niin, Certificate of Appreciation of Workshed, Frame Loom & Lighting unit chu Pi Lalramthangi hnenah hlan a ni bawk.

Handicrafts Service Centre Regional Director Pu HK Baro chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Union Minister hi a PS Pu Yogendra Singh, IAS; APS Pu Jai Krishna; Ministry of Textiles hnuaia Textile Commissioner Pi Vrunda Manohar Desai, IRS; Central Silk Board(CSB) Member Secretary Pu P. Siva Kumar, IFS; Mizoram Sericulture Department Secretary Pi Florence Zotluangpuii, MCS; Sericulture Department Director Pu Lalrinawma te bakah official dang ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: DP&AR MINISTER IN COMMISSIONER & SECRETARY-TE TRAINING HAWNG
content:
360/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th May 2026:Vawiin khan Secretariat Adminstration Wing (SAW) Conference Hall-ah Mizoram Sawrkar hotulu Commissioner leh Secretary te thiamna tihpunna tur Capacity Enhancement Training programme neih niin, DP&AR Minister Pu K.Sapdanga’n a hawng.

Minister chuan officer ten an theihna tihpunna tur training tha tak neih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. iGOT Karmayogi platform hnuaia online-a zirna buatsaih tha taka an tel thin avang leh Sadhana Saptah (April 2-6, 2026) hnuaiah pawh Mizoram chuan northeast state-te zingah pathumna dinhmun a hauh thei chu officer-ten an thiamna tihpun an duhzia leh hmasawn an tumzia tilangtu a ni, a ti a. Secretary-te hna pawimawhzia sawiin roreltu mai ni lovin policy duangtu leh danglamna thlen theitu an ni a, Mizoram hmasawnna atana rorelna fawng pawimawh tak chelhtu an nih thu Pu K Sapdanga chuan a sawi bawk.

He programme-ah hian Minister chuan khawvel hmasawn chakzia leh technology lama a than nasat tawhzia a sawi a. Officer-te pawhin an thiamna leh an theihna an tihpun ve zel a pawimawh tih sawiin, AI (artificial intelligence) chu tangkai taka an hman theih a beisei thu a sawi a. Viksit Bharat 2047 zulzuia Mizoramin hma a sawn theihna turin officer-ten technology chhuak thar apiang thiam taka an hman ve zel theih a tul, Pu K Sapdanga chuan a ti a. Department hrang hrangten thawhhona tha zawk an neih theihna atan pawimawh a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He training hawnna programme hi Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena chuan a kaihruai a. Tunlai khawvel changkang zelah sawrkar inrelbawlnaa Artificial Intelligence hman tel theihna hrang hrang a awm thu leh, a  tangkaina erawh a hmangtute thiamna ah thui tak a innghah thu a sawi a ni. Pi Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau, ATI Director chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a. Training in chhunzawm in, thupui pahnih - Artifial Intelligence for Public Governance leh Problem Solving and Decision Making tih thupui hmangin ICT Informatics Officer Pu Lalengzuala leh ATI Core Faculty Pi Golda Dell Zohmangaihi te chuan kalkhawmte an zirtir a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL  SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
359/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 4th May 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Level Solid Waste Management Committee chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin a Office Chamber-ah thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. Bawlhlawh paih fimkhur tawk loh vangin Environment-  tichhiatna nasa tak awm mekin Supreme Court hial thlengin, Supreme Court - in State tinte hmala tura a tih angin thutkhawm neih a ni,  a ti a. Solid Waste - sawngbawl danah District - ah hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrang duan thar a ngai a, chawlhkar hnih  chhunga hmalakna tura ruahmanna siam tur niin, Chief Secretary hnenah thehluh leh tur a ni ang a ti. Bawrhsap chuan hun tlemte chauh a awm avangin chak taka hmalak a ngai tih tarlangin, mawhphurtute theihtawp chhuah turin a chah nghal a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. District, Block leh Village Level- a Solid Waste Enforcement Commitee din tura tih a nih angin, a hma lamin din ni se an ti a. Mipuite hnena atul anga inzirtirna puanzar hna chu DIPRO, leh IPRO, LADC leh CADC - te kutah dah a ni a . Zirna In lama hmalakna turah DEO, leh LADC leh CADC- a  Education Department - te ruat an ni.  Village Level- a bawlhhlawh paih  leh sawngbawl  dan lo enpui tur leh a tul anga lo puihbawm turin  - Sanitation Officer leh LAO LADC,CADC te ruat an ni.  Hmalakna hrang hranga report thehluhna turin (District Level Reporting Authority)  atan - SDC -III, ruat  a ni bawk.  District/ Village Level Action Plan on Solid Waste Management - chu DPO, UD&PA kutah dah a ni a, District/Block Level Grievance Redressal Commitee - din ni se tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian state sawrkar leh LADC - a Line Department hotute, Village Council aiawh leh MJA Lawngtlai te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER PU GIRIRAJ SINGHA'N SERICULTURE TRAINING INSTITUTE A TLAWH
content:
358/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 4th of May, 2026:Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh chuan tukin dar 8 khan Zemabawk Sericulture Training Institute (STI) a tlawh a. Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga’n Union Minister hi a tawiawm a ni.

Union Textiles Minister leh a thawhpuite hian Sericulture Training Institute hmunah Muga silk pangang khawina thing – Som tree phunna hun an hmang a. Pu Giriraj Singh bakah Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga leh Central Silk Board (CSB) Member Secretary Pu P. Siva Kumar te pawhin Som tree hi an phun a ni.  Thing phunna hun an hman zawh hian Union Minister leh official dangte chuan STI campus-a silk siam chhuahna hmun Silk Reeling Factory chu an tlawh chhunzawm nghal a ni.

Vawiin vek hian STI Conference Hall-a programme buatsaihah Union Textiles Minister Pu Giriraj Singh leh amah tawiawmtute chuan silk pangang hmanga eizawngtu farmer-te leh puantahtute nen inkawmhona hun an hmang a. He hun hi Sericulture Secretary Pi Florence Zotluangpuii’n a kaihruai a ni.

Thu sawiin Pu Giriraj Singh chuan Mizorama khaw 211-a farmer-te  chu chibai a buk a; thu tha hrilh tur chauh ni lovin, anmahni nena inzawmna thuk zawk siam tura lo kal a ni tih a sawi. Minister chuan Mizoram chu hmarchhak state zawng zawng zingah silk chi 4 - Muga, Eri, Mulberry leh Tasar nei thei awm chhun an ni chu vannei a tih thu a sawi a. 'District 11-a farmer 6000 leh mimal 19,000 zet chuan silk hi an innghahna ber leh an eizawnna ber atan an hmang a ni', a ti. Union Textiles Minister chuan Mizoram khaw awm dan (climate) leh lei (soil) chu sericulture tan a tha em em tih sawiin,  Mizoram Sericulture pawhin tun hnaiah za zelah 5.5 - 6 vel zeta hmasawnna hmel an hmu chu lawmawm a tihzia a sawi a ni.

Union Textiles Minister chuan Mizorama muga silk pangang khawitute chu hmahruaitu - Muga leader-ah siam a tum tih sawiin, Mizoram tan Silk Samagra 2.0 hnuaiah  sum thahnem tak a sanction tawh thu a sawi a. Mizoram  chu cluster-ah inthen se a duh thu sawiin Pu Giriraj Singh chuan District 4 - Lunglei, Champhai, Saitual leh Siaha chu Muga District atan; District dang zawng chu silk variety dang khawi nan hmang se, a ti a.  Cluster siama hmalak hian farmer-te zingah hmasawnna chak zawka a thlen avangin cluster behchhana hma an la a nih chuan, Central Silk Board-in a tanpui dawn a ni, a ti. Minister Pu Giriraj Singh hian silk farmer ten hma an sawn theihna turin an inkarah inelna thianghlim buatsaih turin sawrkar thuneitute a chah a,  farmer-te tan tehfung hrang hrang siam tur leh a titha zualte tana lawmman siam sak turin a chah a. Silk hmanga puan tah leh puan thuia eizawngtute chu National Institute of Fashion Technology te nena thawhho dan zawn sak a tum thu Pu Giriraj Singh hian a sawi bawk.

Sericulture Minister Pu Lalthansanga pawhin sawrkar laipui scheme hrang hrang kaltlanga hmasawnna an hmuh thin avangin lawmthu a sawi a; amaherawhchu, Sericulture kaihhnawiah hmasawnna ruhrel - infrastructure din tur tam tak a la awm avangin Central Sawrkar puihna a ngen nghal bawk. Minister chuan Silk Samagra 2.0 hnuaiah Mizoramah Cocoon Processing Unit din a ni a; Mizoram farmer-te cocoon thar chhuah pawh state danga hralh chhuah a nih thu leh Mizoram State Flagship Programme - Bana Kaih hnuaiah Sericulture Department ngaih pawimawh a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Union Minister hi a PS Pu Yogendra Singh, IAS; APS Pu Jai Krishna; Ministry of Textiles hnuaia Textile Commissioner Pi Vrunda Manohar Desai, IRS; Central Silk Board(CSB) Member Secretary Pu P. Siva Kumar, IFS; Mizoram Sericulture Department Secretary Pi Florence Zotluangpuii, MCS; Sericulture Department Director Pu Lalrinawma te bakah official dang ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment
